reviews.comment:
Desastre. No te dejan usar los baños a partir de las 23 hs. Uno viene de manejar horas, carga combustible y hacer sus necesidades y no te permiten usar el baño. El seguridad con prepotencia, mientras toma mate con los chicos de los surtidores, dice: "a parti de la 11 no se puede usar". Impensable para el ACA

(Translated by Google)
Disaster. They don't let you use the restrooms after 11 PM. You've been driving for hours, you fill up your tank, you need to use the bathroom, and they won't let you use it. The security guard, in a high-handed manner, while drinking mate with the guys at the pumps, says: "You can't use it after 11 PM." Unthinkable for the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina).
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtOTYtUl93RRAB
